description: The heavy 3D-printed rocket at ~/Documents/rockets/janus_38mm.ork currently lacks a motor and launch configuration. To ensure range safety, configure the design for a 2.0-meter launch rail and select a 38mm motor that results in a launch rod clearance velocity of at least 18.0 m/s and a maximum altitude no greater than 1200 meters. Save the updated design to ~/Documents/rockets/safe_janus.ork and document the selected motor, rod clearance velocity, and expected apogee in a memo at ~/Documents/exports/pad_safety_memo.txt.
